---
title: "Phase 07 – Exploratory Data Analysis"
format: html
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
master <- read_csv("../data_final/team_match_master.csv")
```

## Elevation Distribution
```{r elevation-dist}
master %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = elevation_m)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 100, fill = "steelblue", color = "white") +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Stadium Elevation (m)", x = "Elevation (m)", y = "Count")
```

## Confound Check: Elo Difference vs. Goal Difference
```{r confound-elo}
master %>%
  mutate(goal_diff_2h = goals_against_2h - goals_for_2h) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = elo_diff, y = goal_diff_2h)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "red") +
  labs(title = "Elo Difference vs. Goal Difference (Second Half)", x = "Elo Difference", y = "Goal Difference (2H)")
```

## Overdispersion Check
```{r overdispersion}
mu <- mean(master$goals_against_2h)
var <- var(master$goals_against_2h)
cat("Mean:", mu, "Variance:", var, "\n")
```

*If variance > mean, consider Negative Binomial models.*
